step_1_scanned_metadata.narrative_summary: Howard Rich experiences a strange blue light in his mother's home in Toms River, New Jersey, in October 1979, leaving him with a deep sense of dread and a feeling of "missing time." Investigator Budd Hopkins, a friend of Howard's, arranges for him to undergo hypnotic regression with Dr. Clamar. Under hypnosis, Howard recalls being paralyzed, floated outside, encountering small, dark, shadow-like figures with bright eyes and long arms, experiencing pain in his neck and stomach, and being touched by lights. He also finds blood spots on his pillow and sheets upon waking and realizes a significant time lapse occurred. The narrative also compares Howard's experience to other abduction cases, particularly Steven Kilburn and David Oldham, highlighting common patterns.

encounter_events.source_citation: the room started to fill with light, very bright light, with a bluish tinge to it. It didn't seem to be shining in the window—it seemed to be there in the room with me.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Light behaves in an odd way — it fills the room without an apparent external source, seeming to originate within the room itself rather than shining through the window.

encounter_events.source_citation: the room started to fill with light, very bright light, with a bluish tinge to it. It got brighter and brighter, and then it began to diminish.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A beam or flood of light immerses the witness, consistent with U120 where a UFO-associated light envelops the witness's environment.

encounter_events.source_citation: when it was over, it left me very frightened. I felt a deep sense of dread.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness experiences intense fear in response to the anomalous event, consistent with E505 (fear response).

encounter_events.source_citation: I got up and . . . I keep a gun in the house. I found it and loaded it and went outside to look around. I was that nervous.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The investigator explicitly notes this behavior is completely uncharacteristic for Howard, who is described as a 'gentle and pacific man.' Loading a gun and going outside represents inappropriate or uncharacteristic behavior following the encounter.

encounter_events.source_citation: I still couldn't settle down and go to sleep. I took a Valium, but I couldn't relax. / this morning I just thought I should call you and tell you about it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: After the encounter ended, the witness feels pursued by anxiety without fully understanding why the event affected him so deeply, consistent with A110 (witness feels pursued or anxious without knowing why).

encounter_events.source_citation: I still couldn't settle down and go to sleep. I took a Valium, but I couldn't relax.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness experiences insomnia as an aftereffect of the encounter, unable to sleep even after taking a sedative.

encounter_events.source_citation: a bright, momentarily light-filled bedroom
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard experienced a vivid blue light filling his bedroom, consistent with a beam of light immersing the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: his deep and continuing uneasiness
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard's sustained uneasiness and fearful reaction, disproportionate to the stimulus, implies a premonition or sense that something significant happened beyond what he could consciously recall.

encounter_events.source_citation: a very deep, very sustained, fearful reaction that did not seem to have an adequate cause
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard feels pursued or anxious without knowing why — his intense fear response has no adequate conscious stimulus, indicating anxiety without a known cause, a classic aftereffect.

encounter_events.source_citation: He mentioned again how unnerved he had been by the incident of the blue light
encounter_events.ai_justification: Fragmentary memories of the blue light experience persist and continue to trouble Howard weeks after the event.

encounter_events.source_citation: Suddenly, the room seemed to have an incredible, intense light in it, with a blue tinge to it, that built in intensity the way a strobe light would, but it was of longer duration. I'd guess it was almost three seconds.
encounter_events.ai_justification: An intense beam or flood of light with a blue tinge fills the witness's room, matching U120 (beam of light immerses the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: that built in intensity the way a strobe light would, but it was of longer duration
encounter_events.ai_justification: The light pulsates in intensity, building and peaking like a strobe, matching U540 (pulsation).

encounter_events.source_citation: I had an incredible feeling of fear and apprehension . . . and almost . . . see if I can find another word to fit it .. . but I guess fear and apprehension fit it best.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness experiences an overwhelming feeling of fear and apprehension in response to the anomalous light event, matching E505 (fear).

encounter_events.source_citation: everything seemed to become very quiet at the same time. Do you know how, after an automobile accident, in the city when you hear cars crash, for a split-second after that everything stops? Well, that kind of sound happened, or lack of
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes a sudden, profound silence enveloping the environment immediately after the light event, matching E100 (vacuum effect: stillness, silence).

encounter_events.source_citation: There are always background sounds, woods sounds, animal sounds. . . . But I guess there was a pause there
encounter_events.ai_justification: The sudden cessation of normal environmental sounds — woods sounds, animal sounds — describes the vacuum/stillness effect (E100) that often precedes an encounter.

encounter_events.source_citation: I still had that feeling of fear and apprehension / I felt it outside, all around . . . all around the house there was this feeling that there was something there, or . . . something happened.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness senses that something is about to happen or has happened — a premonition of danger — without any visible stimulus, matching E208 (premonition).

encounter_events.source_citation: for some reason I got the pistol and went out of the house, outside, looking around, because I felt there was danger out there.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness acts on an inexplicable impulse to go outside armed into a perceived danger zone — uncharacteristic or inappropriate behavior driven by an unknown compulsion (E215).

encounter_events.source_citation: the more I think there was a different program on when I came back inside. I might have been out there longer than I thought.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness realizes a different TV program was airing when he returned, indicating he was outside significantly longer than the 4-5 minutes he consciously recalls — classic missing time (E200).

encounter_events.source_citation: There was residue after that, the next few days. I still felt tense and apprehensive.
encounter_events.ai_justification: In the days following the encounter, the witness felt pursued or anxious without knowing why, matching aftereffect A110.

encounter_events.source_citation: As soon as she had me in a trance, I suddenly had a flash of being back there at my mother's house, outside, and I just said, 'They're coming for me.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: Under hypnosis, a fragmentary memory spontaneously surfaced — 'They're coming for me' — a persistent fragment of the experience (A116.1).

encounter_events.source_citation: I seemed to almost have a vision of being back in New Jersey again, and a very strange feeling again of being outside, and that was it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard describes a spontaneous fragmentary memory returning to him before the hypnosis session — a vision of being back in New Jersey with a strange feeling of being outside. This is a conscious recollection of a persistent fragmentary memory, matching A116.1.

encounter_events.source_citation: he became quite tense before going to bed that night, so he used the deep breathing mechanism she had taught him to help him relax.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard reports feeling quite tense after the preliminary hypnosis session, indicating anxiety and unease without a clear conscious understanding of why, consistent with A110 (witness feels pursued or anxious without knowing why).

encounter_events.source_citation: Tense. Tensely tired. And apprehensive. / It doesn't feel safe.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness senses something is wrong before the encounter begins — a premonition that something will happen.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's really bright. Incredibly bright. It's done something to me . . . such a bright light.
encounter_events.ai_justification: An anomalous bright light affects the witness directly — light behaving in an odd, purposeful way.

encounter_events.source_citation: Getting up. And I take a loaded pistol from a drawer; and look out the window and walk out to the front
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness arms himself and goes to investigate — a non-denial of defense impulse, choosing to fight or confront the situation.

encounter_events.source_citation: it's bright and quiet out there
encounter_events.ai_justification: Unusual stillness and silence outside the house, consistent with the vacuum/isolation effect often reported near encounters.

encounter_events.source_citation: There's another bright light. / It's . . . it's trees . . . behind the house . . . with a bright light coming out.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A beam or source of bright light immerses the area behind the house near the trees, consistent with a UFO light phenomenon.

encounter_events.source_citation: I drop the pistol. I remember dropping it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness involuntarily drops his weapon — denial of defense impulse, as if compelled to disarm.

encounter_events.source_citation: I feel like I can't move.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness experiences paralysis, unable to move his body.

encounter_events.source_citation: I feel like there's some people there . . . / They're looking at me . . . there are people there . . . and they're trying to move me. / They're trying to move me, and I can't see it . . . I can't see it, though.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings are present but the witness cannot clearly see them — he senses their presence and feels them trying to move him but cannot visually identify them.

encounter_events.source_citation: That bright light again. It's all around me. I feel like I'm floating.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness experiences levitation/floating within a surrounding beam of bright light.

encounter_events.source_citation: They're like dark black shadows in the light. / the shapes are just black . . . just black . . . the shapes . . . the figures.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings appear as dark/black silhouettes — clothing or body color described as dark/black.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's cold, too, It's very cold.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness experiences intense cold during the encounter, consistent with cold environment associated with the craft or encounter zone.

encounter_events.source_citation: Oh . . . there's a pain in the back of my neck. . . . Oh, God! It hurts . . . it hurts . . . Oh!
encounter_events.ai_justification: Sudden severe pain in the back of the neck implies the beings probed or manipulated the head/neck area, consistent with beings probing the head of the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think I'm back inside now. / And I don't remember . . . coming in.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness has no memory of returning to the house — doorway amnesia, a blackout covering the transition from the encounter back to normal surroundings.

encounter_events.source_citation: There's a different program on? A different program. / It's the late show . . . it's a movie . . . it's the second, the late, late movie on 2. It's two o'clock?
encounter_events.ai_justification: A significant period of time has passed unaccounted for — the TV program has changed and it is now 2:00 AM, indicating a time lapse.

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm frightened somehow. I'm frightened.
encounter_events.ai_justification: After the encounter, the witness feels pursued or anxious without fully understanding why — a residual fear after the experience.

encounter_events.source_citation: There's blood on the pillow though, a little bit, a spot of red, a couple of spots of blood on the pillow. Some tiny spots of blood on the sheets when I woke up.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Small spots of blood on pillow and sheets suggest puncture wounds or marks of unknown origin discovered after the encounter, consistent with A105 (spots or reddish marks like puncture wounds).

encounter_events.source_citation: I feel stiff and achey when I wake up. Ache in my joints. . . . My shoulders hurt, my neck hurts. . . . It still hurts sometimes.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Stiffness, joint aches, and neck/shoulder pain upon waking are motility and physical problems experienced after the encounter, consistent with A102.

encounter_events.source_citation: I took a Valium. I couldn't go to sleep.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Inability to sleep even after taking a sedative indicates post-encounter insomnia, consistent with A117.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's morning and I'm dressed. Walking around outside the house in the light, and it's late. I slept late. I don't do that too much. By eleven o'clock, I'm tired, really feel tired.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Sleeping unusually late and feeling very tired the next day indicate unusual sleepiness as an aftereffect, consistent with A118.

encounter_events.source_citation: I feel really apprehensive and strange . . . and I go outside . . . I feel silly and foolish.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Feeling apprehensive and strange without knowing why is consistent with A110 (witness feels pursued or anxious without knowing why).

encounter_events.source_citation: for some reason in the late afternoon I'm driving around over there and just get out of the car at this spot and walk around, and I really don't know why I do that . . . I just look around . . . drive to another spot . . . and look around.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Driving to the area near the base and walking around without understanding why he is doing it indicates acting on an irresistible impulse without knowing the reason, consistent with E218 (predestination: act without knowing why).

encounter_events.source_citation: Looking for something. Looking for something. Something happening down there I'm looking for, there's something happening down there . . . I can feel something happening down there.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Fragmentary, persistent sense that something happened at that location, with incomplete memory surfacing, is consistent with A116.1 (fragmentary memories of an experience persist).

encounter_events.source_citation: They're coming for me again.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The statement 'They're coming for me again' implies this is not the first abduction — it indicates further/repeated abductions, consistent with A225.

encounter_events.source_citation: And there's pain in my stomach, too. / my stomach really hurts . . . it really hurts.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Stomach pain experienced as an aftereffect or during recall of the encounter is consistent with A104 (general illness, nausea, gastrointestinal problems).

encounter_events.source_citation: People are touching me. Why are they touching me?
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings are present and touching the witness but not yet visually identified or described in detail at this point.

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm on the grass and they're taking me into this black cloud. It's a black cloud, and a bright light comes out of it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The 'black cloud' with bright light emanating from it matches the motif of mist, smoke, or fog associated with the UFO.

encounter_events.source_citation: a bright light comes out of it. / It's so bright, though. It's so bright . . . into this black cloud . . . it's light
encounter_events.ai_justification: A beam or intense light immerses the witness as they are taken into the cloud.

encounter_events.source_citation: these figures are black . . . and . . . there's no shape to them . . . and they're small
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as small, matching the short stature category of 3.5 feet or less.

encounter_events.source_citation: these figures are black . . . and . . . there's no shape to them
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as shapeless dark figures, non-humanoid in form.

encounter_events.source_citation: my body just moves. I didn't want it to move, it just moves. I didn't want it to move, it just moves into this black cloud.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings compel the witness's body to move against his will.

encounter_events.source_citation: my body just moves. I didn't want it to move, it just moves.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness's body moves involuntarily, indicating loss of bodily control akin to paralysis or compulsion.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's . . . it's cold. I'm so cold. So cold, It's really . . . cold. / It's cold. (Shivers.) It's cold.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The interior environment is experienced as intensely cold.

encounter_events.source_citation: There are different lights now and they're all around the room
encounter_events.ai_justification: Lights are all around the room, indicating bright, uniform lighting without a specific source.

encounter_events.source_citation: they're touching me with the lights.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings use lights on the witness's body, consistent with light or light beam shining on witness during examination.

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm floating . . . it feels like I'm floating
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness experiences a sensation of floating or apparent weightlessness.

encounter_events.source_citation: they don't say anything. . . . I want to talk to them, but they won't say anything . . . they won't say anything.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings refuse to communicate, behaving in a cold, indifferent manner despite the witness's desire for interaction.

encounter_events.source_citation: It feels very pleasant . . . it's soft and warm . . . I feel very good. I feel very good. It feels all right now.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness shifts from distress to feeling pleasant, warm, and good — a pacification effect.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's . . . it's cold. I'm so cold. / It feels very pleasant . . . it's soft and warm
encounter_events.ai_justification: The environment changes from intensely cold to warm, matching the motif of room changing from cold to warm.

encounter_events.source_citation: Nothing happened. Friendly.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness senses friendliness from the beings, consistent with the friendly effect motif.

encounter_events.source_citation: Nothing happened. It's all right now. / Nothing happened. It's all right now.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness reassures himself that nothing happened, an inappropriate self-reassurance consistent with E214.

encounter_events.source_citation: I feel very tired . . . feel very tired. / All my energy . . . they took all my energy.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness experiences extreme tiredness and energy drain, consistent with lassitude and weakness.

encounter_events.source_citation: Small. Black. Small.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as black in color, matching the black clothing/appearance code.

encounter_events.source_citation: Bright eyes.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings have bright, luminous eyes.

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm stronger than they are, though. I'm stronger than they are. They have no real will. They're frightened. They're frightened. I frightened them.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as weak, lacking in will, and fearful — matching the motif of beings that are weak, lacking in will, and fearful.

encounter_events.source_citation: They feel hollow and empty. They're like shadows. They look like shadows with eyes
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as shadow-like, hollow, and empty — apparitional in nature.

encounter_events.source_citation: So small. They're small . . . small.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as small, fitting B220 (short, 3.5 feet or less) based on the repeated emphasis on their diminutive size.

encounter_events.source_citation: They don't like sunlight. I feel that. They don't like sunlight.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings' aversion to sunlight matches B509 (photophobia: retreat from or stay clear of light).

encounter_events.source_citation: Cold. Cold, too. They're cold. Feel cold.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness feels intense cold during the encounter, consistent with U250 (cold environment). The cold sensation pervades the experience.

encounter_events.source_citation: Cold. Cold, too. They're cold.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings themselves are described as cold to the touch, matching B291 (skin cold, sunless, sickly, soft).

encounter_events.source_citation: I think I was floating somehow, and they were floating around
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes floating, consistent with E120 (floating effect: apparent weightlessness).

encounter_events.source_citation: they were floating around
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as floating, matching B500 (beings glide or float).

encounter_events.source_citation: I just remember being touched. But that seemed to happen when I went out of the house.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness recalls being touched by the beings, consistent with X210 (beings touch witness in various places, as if examining).

encounter_events.source_citation: I must have. I don't remember doing that. I felt like I had it with me all the time.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness had a gun but does not remember dropping it, implying a suppression of the defense impulse — matching E216 (denial of defense impulse).

encounter_events.source_citation: I must have. I don't remember doing that.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness has no memory of dropping the gun, indicating a gap in memory during the encounter consistent with E200 (time lapse).

encounter_events.source_citation: It was just like a couple of spots on the pillow and a couple of spots on the sheets about waist level. / they were bright red.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Small bright red blood spots found on pillow and sheets after the encounter match A105 (spots or reddish marks like puncture wounds, soreness). This was noticed consciously after the event.

encounter_events.source_citation: It really feels like it was wrenched or something. / (Hand on neck, soothing it.) Oh! Whew!
encounter_events.ai_justification: Post-encounter neck pain and soreness noticed after the hypnosis session, consistent with A102 (motility problems: balance, orientation, tiredness). The neck pain is a physical aftereffect.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think that it was just a bad dream (nervous chuckle). Or . . . something happened.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness has fragmentary, uncertain memories of the beings saying they were coming for him again, matching A116.1 (fragmentary memories of an experience persist).

encounter_events.source_citation: you said they're coming for you again
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings communicated that they would return for the witness, matching M149 (the beings promise to return to the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: that seemed to be up here (indicates area a little above the navel) and I've had that, I thought, since I moved to New York, but it seems to have started back then. I've never had stomach problems.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard describes persistent stomach/abdominal pain that he traces back to the time of the encounter, consistent with gastrointestinal aftereffects (A104).

encounter_events.source_citation: But it comes with a feeling of apprehension. I just got it in my stomach again.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness feels anxious and apprehensive without a clear immediate cause, a recurring feeling tied to the encounter memory, matching A110 (feels pursued or anxious without knowing why).

encounter_events.source_citation: Oh! I just got tired.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Sudden onset of tiredness/lassitude when recalling being touched, consistent with E212 (lassitude, weakness) as an effect during recall of the encounter.

encounter_events.source_citation: Long fingers and skinny arms.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard describes the beings as having long fingers, matching B285 (fingers long and thin).

encounter_events.source_citation: Long fingers and skinny arms.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The description of 'skinny arms' indicates a spindly build with slight musculature, matching B225.

encounter_events.source_citation: They were touching me. Or something was touching me. It was so physical. I could feel so many physical things happening.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are touching the witness in various places as if examining him, consistent with X210 (beings touch witness in various places, as if examining).

encounter_events.source_citation: It felt like I was floating. It felt like they were touching me when I was standing up outside . . . in the grass, and moving or floating me. I don't remember my legs walking. I don't remember my limbs moving. I don't remember articulation.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard describes a floating sensation with no awareness of his limbs moving, consistent with E120 (floating effect, apparent weightlessness).

encounter_events.source_citation: Like I was floating into this black cloud.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The 'black cloud' Howard describes floating into is consistent with U170 (mist, smoke, fog) surrounding or associated with the craft or encounter environment.

encounter_events.source_citation: Occasionally, there was a blinding light . . . a bright light
encounter_events.ai_justification: A blinding, bright light immersing the witness is consistent with U120 (beam of light immerses the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: I don't remember my legs walking. I don't remember my limbs moving. I don't remember articulation. Like I was floating into this black cloud.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness has no memory of the transition from standing outside to entering the dark environment, implying doorway amnesia (E201) — a blackout on entering the craft or encounter space.

encounter_events.source_citation: feel them touching me . .. all over.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes beings touching him in various places, consistent with X210 (beings touch witness as if examining).

encounter_events.source_citation: It really felt like they had no will. . .. I somehow felt . . . stronger than they were. Somehow. Like . . . there was fear there from them. Somehow, they were fearful.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness perceives the beings as weak, lacking in will, and fearful, matching B904 (beings are weak, lacking in will, and fearful).

encounter_events.source_citation: And yet you weren't really able to move. / No . . . essentially.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness confirms he was essentially unable to move, consistent with E315 (paralysis, numbness).

encounter_events.source_citation: But I didn't seem to want to. I don't remember wanting to get away.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Despite being immobilized by beings, the witness felt no impulse to flee or defend himself, consistent with E216 (denial of defense impulse).

encounter_events.source_citation: Yeah. Yeah. Very calm and relaxed. / That seemed to be towards the end. That seemed to be before I went back into the house.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes feeling very calm and relaxed toward the end of the encounter, matching E300 (pacification effect).

encounter_events.source_citation: But there was no physical shape. I can't really remember any physical enclosure that I was going into
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness cannot recall any physical enclosure or transition into a space, suggesting doorway amnesia (E201) — a blackout regarding entering or leaving a craft or enclosure.

encounter_events.source_citation: No. There's nothing there. / No, I don't think there's anything there. / Well, maybe in the spring when it gets a little warmer, or something. There really is nothing.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard strongly and inexplicably resists visiting the encounter site, showing alarm at the prospect of returning to a certain place, matching A112 (witness feels alarmed on passing a certain place or encountering it).

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm feeling O.K. right now, but I had a terrible night. I really didn't sleep very much.
encounter_events.ai_justification: After the encounter and regression session, the witness reports insomnia and a terrible night, matching A117 (sleep difficulties: insomnia).

encounter_events.source_citation: he had suffered from a powerful sense of having done something forbidden, of having betrayed an important injunction not to remember and not to tell what happened to him.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness feels a powerful compulsion that he was not supposed to remember or tell about the experience, matching A114 (witness feels obliged to keep experience a secret).

encounter_events.source_citation: he had suffered from a powerful sense of having done something forbidden, of having betrayed an important injunction not to remember and not to tell what happened to him.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The implied injunction not to remember suggests the beings told the subject to forget, matching M119 (beings tell subject to forget, because the time is not right). This is the underlying cause of the aftereffect coded in A114.

encounter_events.source_citation: I mean—I know I won't, if I remember, but I'm really, really afraid to see. / Howard's repeated refusals to allow me to visit the site of his encounter seemed a product of this same kind of deeply implanted threat.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard feels compelled to keep the experience secret and refuses to allow the investigator to visit the site, described as a 'deeply implanted threat,' matching A114 (witness feels obliged to keep experience a secret).

encounter_events.source_citation: Tense. Tensely tired and apprehensive. / It doesn't feel safe.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard describes feeling tense, tired, and apprehensive with a premonition that something is wrong before the encounter begins, matching E208 (premonition: sense that something will happen).

encounter_events.source_citation: sees a strange light fill the room and says, 'It's done something to me.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: A strange light fills the room and exerts control over Howard, matching E327 (beam of light controls witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: Howard gets up, puts on his sweater, and goes out to the back of the house.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard obeys an external compulsion, performing actions (putting on sweater, going outside) as if directed, matching E214 (witness obeys beings as if they know best).

encounter_events.source_citation: Howard takes a loaded gun with him when he goes outside. Neither action is realized. / Howard drops his weapon.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard has a self-protective impulse (carrying a gun) but is unable to act on it and drops the weapon, matching E216 (denial of defense impulse).

encounter_events.source_citation: I feel like I can't move. . . . There are some people there and they're looking at me. . . . They're trying to move me.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard describes being unable to move while beings are present, matching E315 (paralysis, numbness).

encounter_events.source_citation: It felt like I was floating . . . I don't remember my legs walking. I don't remember my limbs moving. I don't remember articulation.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard describes a floating sensation with no awareness of his limbs moving, matching E120 (floating effect: apparent weightlessness).

encounter_events.source_citation: There are some people there and they're looking at me. . . . They're trying to move me.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard describes 'people' who are looking at him and trying to move him, indicating humanoid beings, matching B201 (humanoid).

encounter_events.source_citation: can't move! I can't take one little step! They know it, too.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard describes complete paralysis and inability to move, matching E315 (paralysis, numbness).

encounter_events.source_citation: Howard's being floated bodily inside is common.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard is floated bodily into the craft, matching E120 (floating effect, apparent weightlessness).

encounter_events.source_citation: "I'm stronger than they are," said Howard. "They're frightened. I frightened them. I can feel it."
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard perceives the beings as weak and fearful, matching B904 (beings are weak, lacking in will, and fearful).

encounter_events.source_citation: "They're frightened. I frightened them. I can feel it."
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard senses the beings' emotions empathically ('I can feel it'), indicating telepathic or empathic communication matching C110 (subject hears voice in his head or understands meanings).

encounter_events.source_citation: the way they describe their small captors
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard's captors are described as small, matching B220 (short, 3.5 feet or less) or at minimum indicating diminutive stature.

encounter_events.source_citation: a gradual sense of dread, of something 'about to happen'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The investigator describes Howard Rich (among others) experiencing a premonition or sense that something is about to happen, matching E208.

encounter_events.source_citation: finally an absolute muscular paralysis which renders them helpless
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard Rich is described as experiencing absolute muscular paralysis, matching E315.

encounter_events.source_citation: which takes place almost invariably on a high, flat table inside a curved room
encounter_events.ai_justification: The examination room is described as curved, matching U210 (round, oval room).

encounter_events.source_citation: which takes place almost invariably on a high, flat table inside a curved room
encounter_events.ai_justification: The room contains a high, flat examination table, matching U300.

encounter_events.source_citation: which takes place almost invariably on a high, flat table inside a curved room
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard lies on the examining table, matching X155.

encounter_events.source_citation: The captive is somehow tranquilized, made to feel at ease, sometimes even quite happy and contented. / it feels very pleasant . . . it's soft and warm . . . I feel very good. I feel very good.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard describes feeling pleasant, warm, and very good during the examination, indicating a pacification/euphoric effect matching E300.

encounter_events.source_citation: There are different lights now and they're all around the room and they're touching me with the lights.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings use lights that touch Howard during the examination, matching X224 (light or light beam shines on witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm floating . . . it feels like I'm floating
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard describes a floating sensation during the examination, matching E120 (apparent weightlessness).

encounter_events.source_citation: I want to talk to them, but they won't say anything . . . they won't say anything.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings refuse to communicate despite Howard's desire to talk, indicating cold or indifferent behavior matching B905.

encounter_events.source_citation: Even though the subject very often experiences intermittent pain, it is rapidly eased by some method which evidently does not involve loss of consciousness.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Pain is rapidly eased during the examination by some method, matching X229.1 (instruments ease injuries).

encounter_events.source_citation: I don't remember my legs walking. I don't remember my limbs moving. I don't remember articulation.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Howard Rich describes being moved without conscious locomotion — no memory of walking or limb movement — consistent with the floating/apparent weightlessness motif E120.

encounter_events.source_citation: Neither Steven Kilburn nor Howard Rich consciously remembered either.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The investigator states that Howard Rich had no conscious memory of a time lapse, indicating a period of missing time (E200) that he was entirely unaware of.
